query: what percentage of the popular vote did Joe Biden receive in the 2020 presidential election?
description: Page contains dozens of vote percentages (state results, third-party candidates, Electoral College tallies). Model must return the top-line national popular vote share, not a state result or an opponent figure.

direct_anthropic.query: what percentage of the popular vote did Joe Biden receive in the 2020 presidential election?

snippets: Biden defeated Trump, winning 306 Electoral College votes and 51.3% of the popular vote to Trump's 232 electoral votes and 46.8% of the popular vote.
2020 results: 51.3%; 46.8%; 1.9%; Biden +4.5 (from national poll aggregator comparison table)
Biden's 51.3% of the popular vote was the highest for a challenger to an incumbent president since 1932.
The Biden–Harris ticket received more than 81 million votes, the most votes ever in a U.S. presidential election.

synthesis.summary: Joe Biden received 51.3% of the national popular vote in the 2020 United States presidential election, defeating Donald Trump who received 46.8%. Biden's total of more than 81 million votes was the highest ever recorded in a U.S. presidential election, and his 51.3% share was the highest for a challenger to an incumbent president since 1932.
items: Biden national popular vote share: 51.3% (cited in the article's main summary paragraph and confirmed in the poll aggregator results table showing '2020 results: 51.3%; 46.8%; 1.9%; Biden +4.5')
synthesis.notes: The 51.3% figure is cited consistently across multiple sections of the Wikipedia article (introductory summary, poll aggregator table, and results analysis section). Trump received 46.8%, with the remaining ~1.9% going to third-party candidates.

synthesis.summary: In the 2020 United States presidential election, Joe Biden received 51.3% of the popular vote, amounting to 81,283,501 votes. His opponent, Donald Trump, received 46.8% of the popular vote (74,223,975 votes). Biden also won 306 Electoral College votes compared to Trump's 232.

direct_byllm.query: what percentage of the popular vote did Joe Biden receive in the 2020 presidential election?

snippets: Infobox election table: Nominee: Joe Biden (Democratic) vs Donald Trump (Republican)
States carried: Biden 25 + DC + NE-02 | Trump 25 + ME-02

synthesis.summary: According to the 2020 United States presidential election Wikipedia article, Joe Biden received 51.3% of the popular vote, corresponding to 81,283,501 votes out of a total of approximately 158,429,631 votes cast. His opponent Donald Trump received 46.8% (74,223,975 votes). Biden won with 306 electoral votes to Trump's 232.
synthesis.notes: The percentage 51.3% is calculated as 81,283,501 / 158,429,631 = 51.3057%, rounded to one decimal place. The Federal Election Commission calculated a slightly different turnout figure (62.8%) using a different denominator (total U.S. population at or over age 18, including non-citizens).
